tasks.subject: Task 1: Extract shared context constants
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Consolidate `PPG_CONTEXT` and `RELEASES_CONTEXT` into `frontend/src/lib/contexts.ts` so both `App.vue` and `ArtifactsPanel.vue` import from one place.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/lib/contexts.ts`
- Modify: `frontend/src/App.vue`
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/ArtifactsPanel.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `frontend/src/lib/contexts.ts` exports `PPG_CONTEXT` and `RELEASES_CONTEXT`
- [x] `App.vue` imports `PPG_CONTEXT` from `../lib/contexts` and uses it as the default context
- [x] `ArtifactsPanel.vue` imports both from `../../lib/contexts`; inline constant blocks removed
- [x] `vue-tsc` passes with no type errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/lib/contexts.ts", "frontend/src/App.vue", "frontend/src/components/ArtifactsPanel.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/rdias/Work/percona-obs-dashboard/frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["frontend/src/lib/contexts.ts exports PPG_CONTEXT and RELEASES_CONTEXT", "App.vue imports PPG_CONTEXT from lib/contexts", "ArtifactsPanel.vue imports both from lib/contexts", "vue-tsc passes with no errors"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement useUrlState composable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `frontend/src/composables/useUrlState.ts` with pure helpers `contextToKey`/`keyToContext` and the `useUrlState` composable.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/composables/useUrlState.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `contextToKey` maps prefixes correctly
- [x] `keyToContext` finds context by derived key
- [x] `useUrlState` hydrates refs from URL on mount
- [x] `useUrlState` writes URL via replaceState; defaults omitted
- [x] Pending PR keys resolve once context list populates
- [x] `vue-tsc` passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/composables/useUrlState.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/rdias/Work/percona-obs-dashboard/frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["contextToKey maps ppg/releases/pr-NNN prefixes correctly", "keyToContext finds context by derived key", "useUrlState hydrates refs from URL on mount", "useUrlState writes URL via replaceState on any change with defaults omitted", "Pending PR keys resolve once context list populates"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Lift artifacts state to App.vue and wire URL sync
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move `artifactsVersion`, `artifactsContext`, `artifactsTab`, and `artifactsContexts` from `ArtifactsPanel.vue` to `App.vue`; wire `useUrlState`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/ArtifactsPanel.vue`
- Modify: `frontend/src/App.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `/?tab=artifacts&actx=releases&aversion=17&sub=containers` loads correctly
- [x] `/?tab=board&ctx=pr-106` selects PR context after prGroups loads
- [x] UI changes update URL in-place via replaceState
- [x] `aversion` absent on fresh load
- [x] `vue-tsc` passes

{"files": ["frontend/src/App.vue", "frontend/src/components/ArtifactsPanel.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/rdias/Work/percona-obs-dashboard/frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/?tab=artifacts&actx=releases&aversion=17&sub=containers loads correctly", "/?tab=board&ctx=pr-106 selects PR context after prGroups loads", "UI changes update URL in-place via replaceState", "aversion absent on fresh load; present when user selects explicitly", "vue-tsc passes with no errors"], "modelTier": "standard"}
